claimText: UT Austin acceptable-use guidance says published university information may be used freely with AI tools, while controlled or confidential university information can be used only with university-managed AI tools covered by contracts that protect university data and disable web search functionality.
normalizedValue: Published data allowed; controlled/confidential data limited to contracted university-managed AI tools with protections and disabled web search.

citation.citationTitle: Acceptable Use of Generative AI Tools | UT Austin Information Security Office
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
